excerpt: Stream your movies, TV shows, and music from your own server.
description: Jellyfin is a free and open-source media server that organizes and streams your personal media library to virtually any device. It supports movies, TV shows, music, live TV, DVR, and user accounts without requiring a subscription.
service:
jellyfin:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/jellyfin:latest
    container_name: jellyfin
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=America/New_York
    volumes:
      - ./config/jellyfin:/config
      - ./media/movies:/data/movies
      - ./media/tv:/data/tv
    ports:
      - "8096:8096"
    restart: unless-stopped

excerpt: Manage all your indexers from one place.
description: Prowlarr centralizes indexer management for applications like Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, and Readarr. Configure your indexers once and automatically sync them across your media automation stack.
service:
prowlarr:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/prowlarr:latest
    container_name: prowlarr
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=America/New_York
    volumes:
      - ./config/prowlarr:/config
    ports:
      - "9696:9696"
    restart: unless-stopped

excerpt: A lightweight web interface for managing and viewing files.
description: Qui is a lightweight web application from the autobrr project that provides a simple interface for browsing and managing files through your browser.
service:
qui:
    image: ghcr.io/autobrr/qui:latest
    container_name: qui
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "7476:7476"
    volumes:
      - ./config:/config

excerpt: A lightweight BitTorrent client with a powerful web interface.
description: qBittorrent is an open-source BitTorrent client that provides fast downloads, RSS support, search plugins, bandwidth scheduling, and a modern web UI for managing torrents from anywhere.
service:
qbittorrent:
        image: lscr.io/linuxserver/qbittorrent:latest
        container_name: qbittorrent
        environment:
          - PUID=1000
          - PGID=1000
          - TZ=America/New_York
          - WEBUI_PORT=8080
        volumes:
          - ./config/qbittorrent:/config
          - ./downloads:/downloads
        ports:
          - "8080:8080"
          - "6881:6881"
          - "6881:6881/udp"
        restart: unless-stopped

excerpt: Monitor your system's performance in real time.
description: Glances is a cross-platform system monitoring tool that displays CPU, memory, disk, network, process, and container statistics through an intuitive web interface or terminal dashboard.
service:
glances:
    image: nicolargo/glances:latest
    container_name: glances
    restart: unless-stopped
    pid: host
    network_mode: host
    environment:
      - GLANCES_OPT=-w
      - TZ=America/New_York
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro

excerpt: Monitor your services and get notified when they go offline.
description: Uptime Kuma is a self-hosted uptime monitoring solution that checks the availability of websites, APIs, servers, and services. It includes status pages, notifications, and response time tracking.
service:
uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:1
    container_name: uptime-kuma
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data

excerpt: Host your own Minecraft server in minutes.
description: The itzg Minecraft Server container makes it easy to run a customizable Minecraft server with support for Vanilla, Paper, Spigot, Fabric, Forge, and more. Configure server settings through environment variables and persistent storage.
service:
minecraft:
    image: itzg/minecraft-server:latest
    container_name: minecraft
    ports:
    - "25565:25565"
    environment:
    EULA: "TRUE"
    TYPE: "PAPER"
    VERSION: "26.2"
    MEMORY: "6G"
    MOTD: "Mason's HomeLab Minecraft Server"
    ENABLE_ROLLING_LOGS: "true"
  volumes:
    - ./data:/data
  restart: unless-stopped
